User.title: User
User.description: Represents a user account in the GlowEarn application, storing profile information, financial summaries, and administrative flags.

id.description: Unique identifier for the User entity.

username.description: Unique username chosen by the user.

email.description: The user's email address, used for authentication and communication.

coins.description: The current balance of 'coins' earned by the user within the app.

usd.description: The current balance of USD equivalent earnings for the user.

adsWatched.description: Count of advertisements the user has watched.

avatarUrl.description: URL to the user's customizable golden circular avatar image.

isAdmin.description: Flag indicating if the user has administrative privileges.

lastQuickPuzzleAt.description: Timestamp of the last time the user solved a quick puzzle.

createdAt.description: Timestamp when the user account was created.

updatedAt.description: Timestamp of the last update to the user's profile.

Transaction.title: Transaction
Transaction.description: Records individual financial movements, such as earnings or withdrawals, related to a user's wallet.

id.description: Unique identifier for the Transaction entity.

userId.description: Reference to the User who performed or is affected by this transaction. (Relationship: User 1:N Transaction)

amountCoins.description: The amount of coins involved in this transaction.

amountUSD.description: The USD equivalent amount involved in this transaction.

description.description: A brief description or memo for the transaction.

EarningRecommendation.title: EarningRecommendation
EarningRecommendation.description: Stores AI-generated personalized recommendations for users to optimize their earning potential.

id.description: Unique identifier for the EarningRecommendation entity.

userId.description: Reference to the User for whom this recommendation is generated. (Relationship: User 1:N EarningRecommendation)

title.description: A short, descriptive title for the earning recommendation.

description.description: Detailed explanation of the earning recommendation.

type.description: The category or type of earning activity recommended (e.g., 'ad_campaign', 'survey', 'task').

potentialCoins.description: The estimated coins a user can earn by completing this recommendation.

potentialUSD.description: The estimated USD equivalent a user can earn by completing this recommendation.

isCompleted.description: Indicates whether the user has completed this specific earning recommendation.

createdAt.description: Timestamp when this recommendation was generated.

updatedAt.description: Timestamp of the last update to this recommendation's status or details.

LeaderboardEntry.title: LeaderboardEntry
LeaderboardEntry.description: Represents a user's entry on the leaderboard, typically a denormalized view of their total earnings for ranking purposes.

id.description: Unique identifier for the LeaderboardEntry entity. This could often be identical to the userId.

userId.description: Reference to the User associated with this leaderboard entry. (Relationship: User 1:1 LeaderboardEntry)

username.description: The username of the user, denormalized for efficient leaderboard display.

totalCoinsEarned.description: The total number of coins a user has earned, used for ranking.

lastUpdated.description: Timestamp when this leaderboard entry was last updated.

definition.description: Stores individual user profile data, including username, contact details, and current financial balances.

params.name: userId
params.description: The unique Firebase Authentication User ID of the user.

params.name: userId
params.description: The unique Firebase Authentication User ID of the transaction owner.

params.name: transactionId
params.description: The unique identifier for the transaction.
